untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) ADR indicator not in allowed list; (2) N-day high/low band oscillation detection requires lookback window indexing (close[1..N]) which violates rule 6; (3) 'consecutive days' constraint requires multi-bar state tracking not expressible in single-bar condition format; (4) Model switching logic (sticky_strike vs sticky_delta) is a portfolio/pricing rule, not a price-action entry/exit condition; (5) ATR expansion baseline comparison requires historical volatility regime benchmarking outside standard indicator scope.
translation_notes: This signal describes a volatility surface modeling regime adaptation rule rather than a traditional price-action trading signal. The core requirement—switching between sticky strike and sticky delta models based on market regime—is a quantitative finance pricing assumption, not a tradeable entry/exit condition. A proper implementation would require: custom ADR calculation, multi-bar pattern recognition, regime persistence filters, and volatility model state management at the portfolio optimization level, not the backtest engine condition level.
